headline: Odometer Rollbacks: A Common Scam Impacting Thousands of Canadians
summary: As one of Canada's leading sources of automotive data, CARFAX Canada is warning used car buyers to be vigilant as odometer tampering continues to put Canadian consumers at risk.

headline: S&P 500 pullback coming? The exact level to buy the dip
summary: Adam Turnquist, Chief Technical Strategist, LPL Financial explains why a pullback is likely and the exact S&P levels he’s watching for investors to step in.

headline: CARFAX: Nearly 7 Million Vehicles Have Unfixed Backup Camera Recalls
summary: Backup camera recalls are rising sharply, up more than a million and a half since the start of the year. New CARFAX data shows nearly 7 million vehicles on U.S. roads currently have an unfixed recalltied to their backup camera system, which can reduce driver visibility and increase the risk of a crash.

headline: Moody’s cuts Wabash rating third time in a year, execs eye ‘27 rebound
summary: For the third time in a year, Wabash National has had its debt rating cut by Moody’s. The post Moody’s cuts Wabash rating third time in a year, execs eye ‘27 rebound appeared first on FreightWaves.
